ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Software, Hardware) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the industry (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector of the industry (e.g., Software Development, Medical Devices) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_types" (
  "round_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round type */,
  "round_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the round type (e.g., Up, Down, Flat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the round type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_rounds" (
  "investment_round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment round */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "round_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round type */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of rounds of this type */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment round was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment round was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_rounds_round_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_type_id") REFERENCES round_types ("round_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "barometers" (
  "barometer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each barometer */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "barometer_value" REAL /* Barometer value indicating market sentiment */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the barometer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the barometer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("barometer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_barometers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_price_changes" (
  "median_price_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median price change */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "median_price_change" REAL /* Median price change in percentage */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the median price change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the median price change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("median_price_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_price_changes_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "number_of_financings" (
  "number_of_financings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of financings */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "number_of_financings" INTEGER /* Number of financings in the period */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the number of financings was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the number of financings was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_of_financings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_number_of_financings_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Funding status of the company (e.g., Bootstrapped, Seed, Series A) */,
  "employee_range" TEXT /* Employee range of the company (e.g., 1-10, 11-50) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financings" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "financing_date" TEXT /* Date of the financing */,
  "amount_raised" REAL /* Amount of money raised */,
  "round_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the round type */,
  "investors" TEXT /* List of investors (e.g., VC firms, angels) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financings_round_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_type_id") REFERENCES round_types ("round_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of the user (e.g., VC firm, startup) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., CNN, Forbes) */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_news_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_trends_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
